overview: Mediyra Lab is a B2B partner web app for pathology laboratory collection centers. Collection center owners can log in, book patient tests, track sample statuses, download reports, view earnings, and contact support. Admins manage collection centers, test catalog, pricing, reports, and payments through a dedicated dashboard.
features: Collection center login with role-based access (partner vs admin)
Dashboard with 6 menu cards for quick navigation
Test price catalog with search and detailed test info
Patient test booking with auto-generated Patient ID and QR code
Billing and earnings summary with payment history
Admin dashboard for managing centers, tests, reports, and payments
QR code generation for sample tracking
Mobile-first responsive design with medical blue/white theme
